creator: cbillington@emulti.net
text:
mis-categorised as serious, should be 'non-critical', as system functions  
ok with no dri, just can't play video etc, xv disabled too.

While similar to previous reports in effects, the error about memory  
allocations is new symptom.

Xorg version 6.9.0, but same result obtains with xorg-server-snap of 30  
January 07.

pkg_info:
dri-6.4.1,2
libdrm-2.0.2
libglut-6.4.2
xorg-server-6.9.0_5
xorg-clients-6.9.0_3
